2604.15729.title: MambaBack: Bridging Local Features and Global Contexts in Whole Slide Image Analysis
2604.15729.paper_summary: Whole Slide Image (WSI) analysis is pivotal in computational pathology, enabling cancer diagnosis by integrating morphological and architectural cues across magnifications. Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) serves as the standard framework for WSI analysis. Recently, Mamba has become a promising backbone for MIL, overtaking Transformers due to its efficiency and global context modeling capabilities originating from Natural Language Processing (NLP). However, existing Mamba-based MIL approaches face three critical challenges: (1) disruption of 2D spatial locality during 1D sequence flattening; (2) sub-optimal modeling of fine-grained local cellular structures; and (3) high memory peaks during inference on resource-constrained edge devices. Studies like MambaOut reveal that Mamba's SSM component is redundant for local feature extraction, where Gated CNNs suffice. Recognizing that WSI analysis demands both fine-grained local feature extraction akin to natural images, and global context modeling akin to NLP, we propose MambaBack, a novel hybrid architecture that harmonizes the strengths of Mamba and MambaOut. First, we propose the Hilbert sampling strategy to preserve the 2D spatial locality of tiles within 1D sequences, enhancing the model's spatial perception. Second, we design a hierarchical structure comprising a 1D Gated CNN block based on MambaOut to capture local cellular features, and a BiMamba2 block to aggregate global context, jointly enhancing multi-scale representation. Finally, we implement an asymmetric chunking design, allowing parallel processing during training and chunking-streaming accumulation during inference, minimizing peak memory usage for deployment. Experimental results on five datasets demonstrate that MambaBack outperforms seven state-of-the-art methods. Source code and datasets are publicly available.
2604.15729.paper_summary_zh: 整張幻燈片影像（WSI）分析在計算病理學中至關重要，通過整合不同放大倍率下的形態學和結構線索來實現癌症診斷。多實例學習（MIL）是WSI分析的標準框架。最近，Mamba已成為MIL的有前景的骨幹，因其效率和來自自然語言處理（NLP）的全球上下文建模能力超越了Transformer。然而，現有的基於Mamba的MIL方法面臨三個關鍵挑戰：（1）在一維序列展平過程中破壞二維空間局部性；（2）對細粒度局部細胞結構的次優建模；以及（3）在資源受限的邊緣設備上推理時的高內存峰值。像MambaOut這樣的研究顯示，Mamba的SSM組件對於局部特徵提取是多餘的，閘控CNN已足夠。認識到WSI分析需要類似自然圖像的細粒度局部特徵提取和類似NLP的全球上下文建模，我們提出了MambaBack，一種新穎的混合架構，協調Mamba和MambaOut的優勢。首先，我們提出了希爾伯特取樣策略，以保留1D序列中瓷磚的2D空間局部性，增強模型的空間感知。其次，我們設計了一個層次結構，包括基於MambaOut的1D閘控CNN區塊來捕捉局部細胞特徵，以及一個BiMamba2區塊來聚合全球上下文，共同增強多尺度表示。最後，我們實施了一種非對稱分塊設計，允許在訓練期間進行並行處理，在推理期間進行分塊流式累積，最小化部署時的峰值內存使用。對五個數據集的實驗結果表明，MambaBack超越了七種最先進的方法。源代碼和數據集均可公開獲得。
2604.15729.author: Sicheng Chen et.al.
2604.15729.authors: Sicheng Chen, Chad Wong, Tianyi Zhang, Enhui Chai, Zeyu Liu, Fei Xia
